Ntc Of Hrg For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jan-18-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER 1738 HAIGHT STREET, LLC.'S HEARING For Writ Of Mandate: DENIED. Moving Party filed their Writ on 1/12/05, only 6 days before the hearing date. There is no Proof of Service showing Moving Party served anyone, and Moving Party failed to provide courtesy copies to the court pursuant to Local Rule 8.5. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
